experiment: nsk1 B-prime Stage-0 internal-channel diagnostic at R3 (self back-patch P1 + oracle bridge-patch P2, SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form, 958 covered items; ladder-exhaustion fork rank 3 as amended by ASM-0040..0043)
candidate: nsk1 flagship line (neurosym-kernel-internals): does residual-stream delivery of the engine's grounding rescue text-only failures that text-delivery cannot rescue, without the substitution damage the text channel shows?
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json alongside nsk1-g2d. IMPORTANT SCOPE: nsk1 has NO frozen SAP, NO results-log, NO verdict object - B-prime is a pre-freeze fork diagnostic, every row phase:exploratory (quarantined, uncitable, flips no verdict). This assessment interprets a run whose MECHANICAL gate label is INSTRUMENT-INVALID (spec section 5 rule 1, ASM-0041 revisit clause: control-rescues-at-floor). Per the spec's own decision-rule taxonomy, INSTRUMENT-INVALID lands in the section 8 INCONCLUSIVE branch: maintainer fork on any extension, no automatic spend. Evidentiary grade throughout: MEASURED-exploratory, strictly below verdict grade.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: the runner (Opus, experiment-runner role) executed B-prime on Modal and reported mechanical facts plus one flagged indicative reading (non-binding); what the numbers MEAN - the instrument-invalidity scope, the untested-not-refuted status of the internal-write cell, the learned constraints, and the fork recommendation - is decided here and only here. This record interprets; it does not run, grade, or audit, and it commits the maintainer to nothing.

bprime.registry_status: nsk1 DRAFT (never frozen); B-prime authorised by the maintainer's G2d -> B-prime sequence (ladder-exhaustion fork rank 3), spec docs/next/nsk1-bprime-stage0-spec.md, run 2026-07-10 by the runner role on Modal (A10G, fp32, greedy, chat template, max_new_tokens=16), 32958 rows, 0.457 GPU-h, ~USD 0.50, no abort, no cap trip
bprime.mechanical_gate_label: INSTRUMENT-INVALID (trigger: ctrl_lb_ge_floor - rescue_p1_ctrl Wilson-LB95 0.467 >= 0.15; headroom_ok true; no abort)
bprime.results_log: none (pre-freeze diagnostic; outputs under poc/nsk1/out/bprime/, phase:exploratory)
bprime.cells: P1 self back-patch 35 (ls,lt) cells + control; P2 oracle bridge-patch 36 cells + control; breakage sweep on C100; Swept = all 200 text-only failures (full F, no subsample)
bprime.gate_rule: spec section 5 / ASM-0041: PASS iff Wilson-LB95(rescue_p1) >= 0.15 AND paired excess real>ctrl; KILL iff Wilson-UB95(rescue_p1) < 0.15; INSTRUMENT-INVALID iff control rescues at floor or headroom/abort failure

harness.note: bprime_a10g entrypoint appended per the spec's operational-choice clause; g2/g2b/g2c/g2d entrypoints untouched; target prompts byte-verified against _build_specs_g2b f2_to (100/100 headroom items)

spec.note: pre-declared decision rule and fork branches; ASM-0040..0043

g2d_assessment.note: the delivery-channel separation B-prime was probing

measurement_refs.scope_note: Every number in this assessment: SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct pinned commit 31b70e2e869a7173562077fd711b654946d38674, zero-shot, CLUTRR entity form 2, the 958-item covered set (ASM-0043 contact discipline), greedy fp32 chat template max_new_tokens=16, final-prompt-position replacement patches at prefill only, phase:exploratory. Citing any of them wider re-classifies the citation as EXTRAPOLATION.

_surprise_note: ASM-0041's revisit clause pre-priced the POSSIBILITY that the shuffled-source control rescues at floor (that is why the clause exists), but not the magnitude or the direction of the paired result: the control did not merely match the real arm, it BEAT it (0.525 vs 0.400; paired discordants 29 ctrl-only vs 4 real-only, one-sided p toward real-excess 0.99999). The recount below explains the direction mechanically without invoking any content signal.

interpretation.headline: B-prime is INSTRUMENT-INVALID, and the invalidity is now mechanistically understood: the diagnostic as specified reads PERTURBATION MAGNITUDE, not grounding content, so the internal-write delivery cell stays UNTESTED - not refuted. The gate-bearing P1 self back-patch rescued 0.400 of the 200 text-only failures (Wilson-LB95 0.345 >= the 0.15 floor), which under the ORIGINAL bare any-cell criterion would have counted as a floor-PASS and triggered an nsk1 redesign - but the ASM-0041 shuffled-source control rescued 0.525 (LB95 0.467), firing control_rescues_at_floor [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_summary.json sha256 539040e93c78ec244ad20f77ee32ab7cf19358add5033c525851cea799f1ef7c]. The row-level recount (below) closes the mechanism: whenever ANY patch - right item or wrong item, any source layer - changes the emitted output at all, it lands on gold at 0.43-0.53, indistinguishable across all four strata and consistent with the ~0.5 two-candidate flip rate ASM-0041 predicted for this form; the entire between-arm difference is explained by output-change FREQUENCY (a foreign late-layer vector perturbs 60.3 percent of generations, the item's own vector only ~27 percent), not by source content. A metric that cannot distinguish correct grounding from a wrong-item vector cannot attribute rescue to grounding, in either direction: the real arm's deficit is equally non-attributable, because the self-vector's output-preserving coherence mechanically suppresses its flip opportunities independent of any latent content. P2 (oracle bridge-patch) adds a genuine learned constraint: cross-prompt replacement transplant at the final position delivers nothing (0.040 real vs 0.050 control) and destroys 98.5 percent of correct-item cells - measured destructive irrespective of content. The fork consequence: per the spec's pre-stated branches this is the INCONCLUSIVE path (maintainer fork, no automatic spend); the recommendation below is a bounded redesign that removes the confound by construction, because retiring the internal-write family on an invalid instrument would overclaim exactly the way the honesty rules forbid.

analyst_recount._method: Computed by this role directly from bprime_rows.jsonl (sha256 f45b12e06ec7010d9148611f4dd11a833d69ecac4855d3452109ad8b76522ea4), joining each patched generation to its item's text-only generation. All MEASURED-exploratory, same scope as the header. Summary-level rates (0.400/0.525/0.040/0.050, acc_text 0.7912, b=4/c=29) reproduce exactly.

rescue_given_output_change.reading: Conditional on the patch changing the output, gold-hit rate is ~0.5 in EVERY stratum - real and shuffled alike. There is no source-specific signal anywhere in the grid; the scorer's effective two-candidate answer space (bridge vs chain-top after the anti-echo rule) makes any output-changing perturbation a coin flip, and any-of-35-cells compounds that toward the observed 0.40-0.53 item-level rates.

output_change_rates.reading: The item's OWN late vector largely reproduces the item's own (wrong) output - self-consistency, so few flips; a DIFFERENT item's layer-22 vector is a large incoherent perturbation - many flips. This alone produces the control's any-cell advantage (ls=22-restricted any-cell rescue: ctrl 0.325 vs real 0.175; excluding ls=22 the arms are equal: real 0.385 vs ctrl 0.410) and the 29-vs-4 discordant count, with no content story needed.

analyst_recount.rescue_integrity_check: 0 of the 109 items rescued in either P1 arm had a text-only generation containing the gold surface - the 'rescues' are genuine output changes onto gold, not scoring artifacts; the instrument problem is attribution, not bookkeeping.
analyst_recount.p2_breakage: Mean per-item broken-cell fraction on C100 = 0.985 (per-cell heatmap 93-100 of 100); P2 real 0.040 vs control 0.050 with paired p 0.77. Replacement-transplanting a foreign-context carrier vector into the final prompt position destroys the computation with near-certainty, identically for correct and deranged carriers.
analyst_recount.replication_note: Text-only accuracy 0.7912 on all 958 covered items, with 100/100 agreement against the G2d headroom-slice correctness vector - the G2d R3 capability finding (0.76 on n=100) replicates at 9.6x the sample under byte-identical prompts [MEASURED-exploratory: same rows file; repro_agree_headroom 100].

what_bprime_establishes: INSTRUMENT FINDING (the load-bearing one): the Stage-0 back-patch rescuable-fraction diagnostic, as operationalized (final-prompt-position replacement transplant, any-cell exact-gold rescue, two-candidate entity form), is CONFOUNDED at R3: rescue-given-output-change is ~0.5 in every stratum regardless of source, so the metric measures perturbation frequency, not grounding content. This cannot be read at R3 as specified [MEASURED-exploratory: recount above; scope: this operationalization on this form at this host - see ASM-0110 for what this does and does not license].

THE CONTROL CONJUNCT PAID FOR ITSELF: without ASM-0041's shuffled-source control, B-prime would have PASSED its pre-declared floor (LB 0.345 >= 0.15) and the programme would have re-opened nsk1 at R3 on perturbation noise. A ~USD 0.50 control arm prevented a ~USD 30-70 campaign freeze on a false positive. This validates the amended-criterion discipline for every future Stage-0-shaped probe.

DELIVERY CONSTRAINT (P2, reported-only but instructive): naive cross-prompt replacement transplant of a carrier vector into the final prompt position is measured DESTRUCTIVE (98.5 percent correct-item cell breakage) and content-indifferent (real 0.040 vs deranged 0.050). Whatever a working internal write looks like, it is not single-position wholesale replacement of the final residual with a foreign-context vector [MEASURED-exploratory: heatmap_breakage_c100 + rescue_p2/rescue_p2_ctrl in the summary].

R3 CAPABILITY REPLICATES: 1.7B zero-shot entity-form text-only accuracy 0.7912 on the full 958-item covered set, 100/100 headroom agreement with G2d - the host-selection premise of ASM-0040 strengthens from one n=100 slice to n=958 [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].
what_bprime_does_not_establish: NOT a refutation of the internal-write delivery channel: the channel's cell in the delivery topology remains UNTESTED. An invalid instrument returns no information about the quantity it was built to measure - only about itself [STIPULATED: ASM-0110].

NOT evidence AGAINST latent layer-timing headroom at R3: the real arm's deficit versus control (4 vs 29 discordant) is mechanically explained by self-vector output coherence (fewer flip opportunities), which operates independently of whether latent correct content exists. The KILL branch (UB < 0.15) did NOT fire (UB95 0.458); neither PASS nor KILL is licensed [MEASURED-exploratory bounds; interpretive scope per ASM-0110].

NOT evidence FOR latent headroom either: the 0.400 real-arm rescue is perturbation-attributable in full; nothing in B-prime supports ASM-0042's planning band, which stays an unresolved EXTRAPOLATION with its resolution path now pointing at a redesigned probe.

NOT a verdict, and NOT citable in one: every row is phase:exploratory pre-freeze diagnostic data; the programme's verdict-grade bottom line (zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null) is unchanged; no nsk1 verdict object exists.

NOT a general statement about activation patching, patchscopes, or steering: scope is one host, one form, one position (final prompt token), replacement (not additive) patches, prefill-only hooks, greedy decoding. Additive low-alpha steering, multi-position writes, attention-path patching, and margin-based read-outs are all unmeasured.

fork_recommendation.spec_branch: INCONCLUSIVE (spec section 5 rule 4 via rule 1; section 8: maintainer fork on extension, no automatic spend). The PASS and KILL branches are both unavailable: their preconditions were not met.
fork_recommendation.recommended: REDESIGN (rank 1): commission a B-double-prime Stage-0 spec whose read-out a content-free perturbation cannot pass IN EXPECTATION, per the ASM-0111 constraints: (a) source-KEYED discrimination - patch vectors harvested from a counterfactual pair (same item, two bridge identities); success = the emitted answer TRACKS the injected source's key, chance exactly 0.5 per item by construction, and a shuffled control has no key to track, so control-passing is impossible rather than merely unlikely; and/or (b) a paired continuous margin read-out (delta logit gold-vs-bridge under patch, real minus shuffled), symmetric under content-free perturbation; plus (c) bounded cell multiplicity (no any-of-35 compounding), and (d) a delivery operator informed by the P2 breakage measurement (additive low-alpha steering or non-final-position writes instead of wholesale final-position replacement). Estimated cost is the same band as B-prime (<= USD 25, likely ~USD 1-5 at measured throughput); it stays pre-freeze, exploratory, and fork-deciding only.
fork_recommendation.why_not_retire: Retiring the training-free internal-write family now would convert an instrument failure into a channel conclusion - precisely the over-claim the honesty rules exist to block. The family's ledger after B-prime is: one confounded probe, one measured operator constraint (replacement-at-final-position is destructive), zero valid readings of the channel itself.
fork_recommendation.why_not_rerun_as_is: The confound is structural (two-candidate answer space plus output-changing perturbations), not statistical; more items or more seeds cannot fix it.
fork_recommendation.fallback_if_no_further_spend: PARK (rank 2): record the internal-steering cell as empty-with-learned-constraints and redirect flagship attention to the engine-external topologies the feasibility synthesis already ranks (K-NULL attribution first). Parking is honest; retiring is not.
fork_recommendation.escalation: This recommendation is input to the registered maintainer fork; nothing here authorizes spend or a spec freeze.

interpretation.delivery_topology_update: The feasibility-synthesis delivery split (engine-external verification | text-content delivery | internal state-space delivery) updates in ONE cell, and only with constraints, not a reading: internal-steering stays EMPTY/UNTESTED, now annotated with two learned instrument constraints - (1) the naive oracle/self back-patch probe with an any-cell exact-gold criterion is confounded on two-candidate forms (a shuffled-source control rescues at 0.525; rescue-given-change ~0.5 source-blind), and (2) final-position replacement transplant of foreign-context vectors is measured destructive (98.5 percent breakage) and content-indifferent. The text-delivery cell (negative, measured mechanism, 3 hosts) and the engine-external cell (f2b positive, confounded, audited) are untouched. The synthesis's dated-qualifier edit remains owned by the synthesis's next revision, not this record.

per_thesis_implications.correctness_thesis: Unchanged at verdict level. The delivery picture gains precision without gaining a reading: the cheapest internal-channel instrument is now known-invalid as built, so the thesis's usefulness half still has no measured delivery mechanism at small scale beyond engine-external verification. The constructive contribution is a sharper spec for the next instrument, not a narrowed region.
per_thesis_implications.efficiency_thesis: No update: B-prime carries no cost-vs-capability contrast. The 360M-few-shot second-rung candidate (ASM-0040 revisit clause) is untouched and remains gated on a valid internal-channel result at R3 first.
per_thesis_implications.cross_experiment: Methodological export: every future floor-style gate whose success event can be produced by distribution damage MUST carry a matched-perturbation control conjunct (the ASM-0041 pattern). B-prime is the programme's first measured case of a pre-declared floor that a control arm out-scored - the pattern generalizes to any two-candidate or low-entropy answer space.

The probe produced no valid reading of the internal-write channel; it produced two instrument constraints and a replicated capability premise.

forks_resolved.resolution: OPEN - recommendation recorded: rank 1 REDESIGN under the ASM-0111 read-out constraints (source-keyed contrast and/or paired margin metric, bounded multiplicity, breakage-informed delivery operator); rank 2 PARK the internal-write family as empty-with-learned-constraints; retirement NOT recommended (would read an instrument failure as a channel result); re-run-as-specified NOT recommended (structural confound).

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements.

ledger_updates.statement: The nsk1 Stage-0 back-patch diagnostic as specified is confounded at R3 on the entity form: shuffled-source control any-cell rescue 0.525 (LB95 0.467) vs real 0.400 (LB95 0.345); rescue-given-output-change ~0.43-0.53 in all four (arm x source-layer) strata; the between-arm gap is fully explained by output-change frequency (foreign ls=22 vector 0.603 vs own-vector ~0.27). The metric reads perturbation, not content; the internal-write channel is UNTESTED.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; n_swept=200 (full failure set), 958-item covered set, pinned R3 checkpoint, greedy fp32, final-position replacement patches; flips no verdict

ledger_updates.statement: Cross-prompt replacement transplant of a carrier vector into the final prompt position is destructive and content-indifferent: 98.5 percent mean correct-item cell breakage; rescue 0.040 real vs 0.050 deranged control.

B-prime: mechanical gate label INSTRUMENT-INVALID (control_rescues_at_floor); spec section 8 INCONCLUSIVE branch governs - maintainer fork, no automatic spend; PASS and KILL both unlicensed (LB 0.345 above floor but control-dominated; UB 0.458 above floor). Without the ASM-0041 control conjunct this run would have false-PASSed its floor.
ledger_updates.scope: pre-freeze fork decision; nsk1 stays DRAFT/unfrozen

ledger_updates.statement: R3 entity-form capability replicates at scale: text-only 0.7912 on all 958 covered items, 100/100 agreement with the G2d headroom vector under byte-identical prompts.
ledger_updates.scope: MEASURED-exploratory; strengthens the ASM-0040 host premise; entity form + this covered set only

assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Its in-window precondition (R3 zero-shot entity text-only in [0.05,0.85]) replicated at n=958 (0.7912); the host-selection logic is unaffected by the instrument invalidity and carries to any redesigned probe.

The clause's own text pre-declared this outcome: control rescue at floor => metric uninterpretable on this form => INCONCLUSIVE regardless of the real arm. The criterion performed its guard function (prevented a false floor-PASS) and is retired WITH this operationalization; its successor for two-candidate forms is the ASM-0111 constraint set.

assumptions_resolved.outcome: still-open, resolution path consumed without resolution
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: B-prime was its resolution path but returned no valid reading of the rescuable fraction; the band remains a non-load-bearing EXTRAPOLATION and re-points to any maintainer-approved redesigned probe. It was used only for sizing, as registered; nothing rested on it.

All 958 covered items have now been touched by patched probes under clause (i)-(iv); the verbatim-disclosure obligation binds every future freeze on this corpus, and the skeptic-memo attack clause is now live rather than hypothetical.
Its instrument at the R3 analogue is invalid as built; resolving it at R1/R2 would require the redesigned read-out too. No path to it precedes the maintainer fork.

tree_impact: nsk1 stays DRAFT/unfrozen; the G2 ladder remains CLOSED; B-prime (fork rank 3) is SPENT with gate label INSTRUMENT-INVALID and the post-B-prime maintainer fork is now the flagship line's single open decision. The internal-write delivery cell is UNTESTED with two measured instrument constraints attached; the pre-stated PASS path (nsk1 redesign at R3) and KILL path (retire the family) both remain reachable, but only through a redesigned, control-unpassable probe. No verdict object exists anywhere in this line and nothing here may be cited as one.
